home.heroSubtitle: Free Pet Value List & Trade Calculator
home.faqWhatDesc: Adopt Me Values is the free Roblox Adopt Me value checker that shows you how much every pet is worth — from Legendary Frost Dragons and Shadow Dragons to the newest pets. Look up any pet's trading value and compare it with others before you trade.
home.faqTradeTitle: How to Check if Your Trade is Fair
home.faqTradeDesc: Go to the Trade Checker, add pets to both sides, and instantly see if it's a Win, Lose, or Fair deal. All values updated daily.
home.faqBrowseDesc: Check our complete <link>Adopt Me value list 2026</link> to see every pet ranked by trading value.

values.title: Adopt Me Pet Values
values.subtitle: All Adopt Me trading values updated daily for 2026. Click any pet to see full value details including Neon, Mega Neon, Fly, and Ride prices.
values.noResults: No pets found matching your search.

detail.petDesc: The {name} is a {rarity} pet in Roblox Adopt Me. Its current trading value is {value}, with the Neon version worth {neonValue} and the Mega Neon version worth {megaValue}.
detail.petHighDemand: The {name} is currently in high demand among Adopt Me traders in 2026.
detail.petDemandRank: The {name} has a demand rank of #{rank} in the Adopt Me trading values list.
detail.petPotionInfo: Trading values can vary based on potion status. A No Potion {name} is worth {noPotion}, while Fly ({fly}), Ride ({ride}), and Fly Ride ({flyRide}) versions each have their own distinct trading values. Use our trade calculator to check if your {name} trade is fair.
detail.itemDesc: The {name} is a {rarity} {type} item in Roblox Adopt Me. Its current trading value is {value}.
detail.itemCta: Use our <link>trade calculator</link> to check if your trade is fair.

calculator.title: Trade Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Add pets to each side and check if your trade is fair.
calculator.step1Desc: Click the Add button on the left and search for the pets you're giving away.
calculator.step2Desc: Click the Add button on the right and search for the pets you want in return.
calculator.step3Desc: Toggle between Normal, Neon, and Mega Neon. Set potion status to No Potion, Fly, Ride, or Fly Ride.
calculator.step4Desc: The calculator instantly shows Win, Lose, or Fair with a percentage breakdown.
calculator.faqAccuracyDesc: Our Adopt Me pet trading values are updated daily based on real trading data and community demand. We track Normal, Neon, Mega Neon, Fly, Ride, and Fly Ride values for every Roblox Adopt Me pet in 2026.
calculator.faqWinLoseTitle: What does Win, Lose, and Fair mean?
calculator.faqWinLoseDesc: {win} means you receive more value than you give. {loss} means you give more value than you receive. {fair} means the trade is roughly equal (within 10% difference).
calculator.faqNeonTitle: Can I check Neon and Mega Neon trades?
calculator.faqNeonDesc: Yes! After adding a pet, use the variant toggles on each card to switch between Normal, Neon, and Mega Neon. You can also set potion status for the most accurate value.

trades.title: Trade Listings
trades.subtitle: Browse trades or create your own.

chat.title: Chat
chat.subtitle: Chat with other traders in real-time.

scammer.title: Scammer Database
scammer.subtitle: Check usernames before trading and report scammers to keep the community safe.
scammer.howItWorksDesc: Our scammer database is community-driven. Players can report Roblox usernames they believe scammed them during Adopt Me trades. Reports are reviewed by moderators before being marked as verified. Always check a player's username here before making a big trade!
scammer.tip1: Never trust "trust trades" — always use the trade window
scammer.tip2: Check usernames in our database before trading high-value pets
scammer.tip3: Report scammers to help protect other players
scammer.tip4: Never share personal information during trades

news.title: News & Updates
news.subtitle: Latest Adopt Me game updates, events, and community news.
news.noNewsDesc: We're working on bringing you the latest Adopt Me updates, events, and announcements. Check back soon!

analytics.title: Market Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track pet value trends and see what's hot in the Adopt Me market.
analytics.trendsTitle: Adopt Me Pet Trading Values & Trends
analytics.trendsDesc: Our market analytics dashboard tracks real-time Adopt Me trading data on Roblox. See which pets are gaining trading value, which are declining, and discover the most traded and demanded pets in the community. All trading values are updated daily from thousands of community trades in 2026.
analytics.howWeTrackTitle: How We Track Adopt Me Values
analytics.howWeTrackDesc: Pet trading values are calculated from real trade data submitted by our community. We analyze trade frequency, demand ratios, and value trends to give you the most accurate Adopt Me value list — the best alternative for checking your Roblox pet values.
